vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is partially accurate but shows significant degradation. P3 (Pothos) is present with the rabbit anchor. P1 (String of Nickels) and P2/P4 (Mexican Mint/Silver Guest) are present as pots but show signs of severe decline or total systemic loss of visible foliage.

inventory_reconciliation.P1: Present (Yellow Pot). No visible foliage; appears to be a systemic loss of the primary specimen.
inventory_reconciliation.P2/P4: Present (Black Pot). Minimal to no visible growth; likely systemic loss.
inventory_reconciliation.P3: Present (Black Pot). Pothos leaf visible; White Rabbit anchor present.
inventory_reconciliation.New_Intervention: White charging case (AirPods style) introduced in the current frame.

plant_audit.P1: Empty soil surface, no active growth detected.
plant_audit.P2_P4: Bare soil, no identifiable Mexican Mint or Silver Guest foliage.
plant_audit.P3: Single Pothos leaf remains; appears stable but isolated.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Consistently dark and damp across all pots.
biome_observations.debris: Eggshell fragments present in P3; electronic component (IC chip) present in early frames, removed in later frames.

temporal_deltas.T_minus_5_to_T_minus_2: Gradual loss of structural debris (IC chip removed).
temporal_deltas.T_minus_1: Lighting conditions shifted to extreme low-light/underexposure, obscuring detail.
temporal_deltas.Current: Introduction of white charging case; Pothos leaf in P3 remains the only viable biological specimen.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is in a state of advanced decline. P1, P2, and P4 are effectively dormant or dead. P3 is the only surviving specimen, though it lacks the density expected of a healthy Pothos. The environment is stable but biologically impoverished.
anomalies: Presence of non-biological debris (IC chip, eggshells, charging case).
Total lack of visible foliage in P1, P2, and P4.
vision_report.narrative_description: The botanical collection is suffering from a high rate of attrition. The transition from the earliest image to the current state shows a loss of secondary objects and a failure of the primary plants to thrive. The current environment is dominated by empty soil, suggesting either a failure in care or a recent clearing of the pots. The Pothos in P3 is the sole survivor, maintaining a static state.
